options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates for the area from which to decompress PG. Only special wires and special vias within the specified area will be decompressed. Default: Decompress all PG structure.

options.name: -layers
options.description: Specifies the layers on which to decompress PG. You must use LEF layer names or a routing layer index value (1 for the first routing layer, 2 for the second routing layer, and so on). ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specifies the nets from which to decompress PG. ((net)+, optional)
